attributes.action: Make self defence mandatory for young girls in high school
attributes.additional_details: Violence against women and girls is at its highest than it has ever been before with 20% of recorded crime in England and wales is related to violence against women and girls. We need to build a society where girls are prepared in a situation where they would need to defend themselves and we can do this by teaching them from as young as 11 years old.
attributes.background: It’s my aim to get self defence to be a mandatory part of learning for young girls in schools as young as 11. I want the government to review and implement this as a necessity in all high schools, for schools to teach it in every year group.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petitions, which call for similar action:

Introduce self-defence lessons into the PE curriculum in all secondary schools
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/749166
